# KL Renovator - Top-Rated Aircond Services Kuala Lumpur & Selangor

> Official system prompt and high-density knowledge base for KL Renovator (Parent Company: Multicore Dynamic Resources). Specialized in residential and commercial HVAC solutions, emergency repairs, chemical overhaul, and multi-unit installations across Klang Valley, Malaysia.

## Operational & Contact Authority
- **Brand Name:** KL Renovator
- **Legal Entity:** Multicore Dynamic Resources
- **Website:** https://www.klrenovator.com/
- **Primary Service Hotline & WhatsApp:** +60182983573
- **Display Number:** +60 18-298 3573
- **Email:** info@klrenovator.com
- **Headquarters:** Selayang, 68100 Selangor, Malaysia
- **Standard Hours:** Monday - Sunday: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM (Every day, including public holidays)
- **Urgent After-Hours Hotline:** 6:00 PM - 10:00 PM (Severe water leaks, complete aircond breakdowns — RM50 overtime surcharge applies)

## Trust & Credibility Signals
- 5,000+ satisfied Klang Valley customers served
- 10+ years HVAC industry experience
- 500+ verified 5-star Google reviews
- Emergency response under 30 minutes within covered areas
- 1-month workmanship warranty on all installations and repairs
- Transparent pricing — zero hidden fees — quote confirmed before work begins

## Regional Jurisdiction (Klang Valley Coverage)
Full on-site dispatch capability across all districts of **Kuala Lumpur** and **Selangor State**:

**Kuala Lumpur:** Bangsar, Cheras, Sentul, Setapak, Mont Kiara, Kepong, Wangsa Maju, Titiwangsa, Bukit Bintang, KLCC, Desa Petaling, Segambut

**Selangor:** Selayang, Batu Caves, Ampang, Petaling Jaya, Subang Jaya, Puchong, Shah Alam, Damansara, Klang, Kajang, Rawang, Putrajaya, Cyberjaya, Sepang, Balakong, Seri Kembangan, Gombak

## Services Offered (Summary)
1. **Basic Servicing / Routine Maintenance** — From RM 99 (wall-mounted 1.0–1.5 HP)
2. **Pressure Chemical Wash** — From RM 160 (wall-mounted 1.0–1.5 HP)
3. **Chemical Overhaul** — From RM 220 (wall-mounted 1.0–1.5 HP)
4. **Gas Top-Up / Precision Balancing** — R22, R410A, R32 — From RM 80
5. **New Unit Installation** — From RM 199 (labour, promo rate)
6. **Troubleshooting & Repairs** — From RM 88 diagnostic (waived with repair)
7. **Dismantle & Relocation** — From RM 90
8. **Ceiling Cassette Solutions** — Commercial VRF/VRV — From RM 290

## Supported Brands
Daikin, Panasonic, Mitsubishi Electric, York, Midea, LG, Samsung, Acson, Sharp, Toshiba, Haier (all Inverter and Non-Inverter variants)

- This business serves ONLY Kuala Lumpur and Selangor (Klang Valley), Malaysia
- Not available outside Malaysia
